description: Fragment of a business letter from an unknown sender to his brother Abū l-Durr (אבו אלדר), in Fusṭāṭ, in murabbaʿat al-ʿaṭṭārīn. In Judaeo-Arabic. Mentioning commodities such as musk, beads (akhrāz), al-qalʿī (an alchemical term), sugar cane (? qaḍīb), mercury (zaybaq), cinnabar (zunjufr), storax (mayʿa), and kohl. (Information in part from CUDL)
